files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: Done: added metadata dict + note/created/modified handling in parse() while-loop (before the 'token.value in variables' dup check), and appended a new 'metadata' param as the LAST positional arg of _make_node()/its call site, plus output_node.trans_metadata assignment at the end of _make_node before return. All tests pass (830 passed). If you edit the same while-loop or _make_node signature, please rebase on top of my changes (pull current file state) rather than overwriting — happy to help merge if there's a conflict.
